refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns TRUE if two 2D float precision bounding boxes (BOX2DF) intersect each other.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The && operator returns TRUE if two 2D bounding boxes A and B intersect each other, using float precision. This means that if A (or B) is a (double precision) box2d, it will be internally converted to a float precision 2D bounding box (BOX2DF)

note.para: This operator is intended to be used internally by BRIN indexes, more than by users.

refsection.para: Availability: 2.3.0 support for Block Range INdexes (BRIN) was introduced.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT ST_MakeBox2D(ST_Point(0,0), ST_Point(2,2)) && ST_MakeBox2D(ST_Point(1,1), ST_Point(3,3)) AS overlaps;
overlaps ---------- t (1 row)
